text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----

Jeremy Karlson wrote:
| The following reply was made to PR ports/106095; it has been noted by
GNATS.
|
| From: Jeremy Karlson <karlj000@unbc.ca>
| To: bug-followup@FreeBSD.ORG
| Cc:
| Subject: Re: ports/106095: [PATCH]: emulators/adamem: Respect X11BASE.
| Date: Thu, 30 Nov 2006 19:45:40 -0800
|
|  Please do not apply this patch.  I just submitted one the other day
|  that does basically the same thing.
|
|  -- Jeremy
|

Jeremy,
	Could you please give me the PR number so that I may review/commit your
patch. I was unable to locate it within gnats. Thanks

- --
- -----------------------------
Frank J. Laszlo
